description_long: This is a large, U-shaped apartment building with a modern, urban design, featuring a mix of beige, gray, and red facades. The exterior walls are punctuated by rows of regularly spaced windows and numerous balconies, giving the building a rhythmic and organized appearance. The flat roof is detailed with various rooftop structures and utility elements, typical of contemporary residential complexes. The building encloses a central courtyard, which is open on one side, likely serving as a communal or green space for residents. The main entrance is located at the base of the U, with multiple doorways visible. The structure is constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with metal railings on the balconies.
description: A modern, U-shaped apartment building with beige, gray, and red facades, featuring rows of windows and balconies, and a central open courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open side of the U-shape, with the main entrance and a prominent mix of beige, gray, and red facades.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long exterior wall with a regular pattern of windows and balconies, and the closed end of the U.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the inner courtyard and the back facades, with visible balconies and windows facing inward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other long exterior wall, similar in window and balcony arrangement to view 1.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a highly regular, grid-like pattern with even spacing and alignment across all facades, often grouped vertically with balconies interspersed.
